# Helios Logistics Briefing

Shipment SHP-004 is handled by Carrier Cargo Pulse. Shipment SHP-004 travels on Route RTE-002 from Sao Paulo to Curitiba. Shipment SHP-004 departs from Warehouse Curitiba Cold Storage and arrives at Warehouse Sa

source_index.delivery_notes:
Event EVT-005 records that shipment SHP-004 was loaded in Curitiba on 2026-04-05T09:30:00.
Event EVT-006 states that shipment SHP-004 suffered a refrigerated inspection delay at Joinville on 2026-04-06T21:10:00.
Event EVT-007 confirms that shipment SHP-004 was delivered in Salvador on 2026-04-07T11:40:00.

Operations manager Marina Costa said that the delay was caused by temperature inspection procedures.
source_index.operations_briefing:
# Helios Logistics Briefing

Shipment SHP-004 is handled by Carrier Cargo Pulse. Shipment SHP-004 travels on Route RTE-002 from Sao Paulo to Curitiba. Shipment SHP-004 departs from Warehouse Curitiba Cold Storage and arrives at Warehouse Salvador Regional Hub.

Shipment SHP-008 is handled by Carrier Blue Route Logistics. Shipment SHP-008 uses Route RTE-007 from Santos to Vitoria and is delayed after a mechanical issue.

Carrier Atlas Freight supervises shipment SHP-003 on Route RTE-003 from Rio de Janeiro to Brasilia.
